form.title: Title
form.windowCap: The window may span at most 6 months.
form.autoApproveHint: Anyone who asks to enter gets access immediately, without waiting for your approval. You can change this later.

autoApprove.label: Auto-approve
autoApprove.tooltip: When on, anyone who asks to enter gets access immediately
autoApprove.title: Turn on auto-approve?
autoApprove.description_one: Turning on auto-approve will also approve the {{count}} pending request right now. Continue?
autoApprove.description_other: Turning on auto-approve will also approve the {{count}} pending requests right now. Continue?

closeVoting.label: Close voting
closeVoting.title: Close voting?
closeVoting.description: Close voting for "{{title}}"? Participants can no longer change their availability. You can reopen voting later.

deleteEvent.label: Delete event
deleteEvent.title: Delete event?
deleteEvent.description: Delete "{{title}}"? This removes all access requests and votes too. This cannot be undone.

removeVote.label: Remove vote
removeVote.title: Remove vote?
removeVote.description: Remove {{name}}'s vote on {{date}}? This cannot be undone.

finalize.title: Finalize this date?
finalize.description: Finalize {{date}} for "{{title}}"? Voting ends and the event cannot be reopened. This cannot be undone.

clearVotes.label: Clear votes
clearVotes.title: Clear votes?
clearVotes.description: Clear all {{count}} of {{name}}'s votes for this event? They stay in the event and can vote again. This cannot be undone.

removeParticipant.label: Remove
removeParticipant.title: Remove participant?
removeParticipant.description: Remove {{name}} from this event? All of their votes are deleted too. They can request to enter again later. This cannot be undone.

errors.windowOrder: Window end must not be before window start
errors.windowCap: The date window may span at most 6 months
errors.outsideWindow: Day is outside the event window
errors.finalizedOutsideWindow: Finalized date must be inside the event window
errors.creatorNotRemovable: The event's creator cannot be removed
